# Web Cited

> Web Cited is an independent Search Experience Optimization (SXO) audit practice for mid-market and enterprise teams. We run fixed-price $5,000 audits that test how your brand is cited across SEO (Google, Bing), AEO (Google AI Overviews, featured snippets), and GEO (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude). One deliverable. No retainer. No upsell.

Web Cited is a senior-led consulting practice. The entire offering is one thing: a one-time SXO Audit ($5,000). We do not sell retainers, managed services, content production, link building, or tracking subscriptions. The audit is the product.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://web-cited.com/): Overview of the SXO audit practice and the core positioning.
- [Services](https://web-cited.com/services.html): What the $5,000 SXO Audit includes - SEO, AEO, GEO, and off-site discoverability coverage.
- [How It Works](https://web-cited.com/how-it-works.html): The fixed six-step audit process from intake through delivery.
- [Why SXO](https://web-cited.com/why-sxo.html): Definitions of SEO, AEO, GEO, and SXO - and why traditional SEO audits no longer cover the full revenue surface.
- [Pricing](https://web-cited.com/pricing.html): Fixed $5,000 price, cost comparison against agencies and freelancers, and an FAQ covering scope and deliverables.
- [About](https://web-cited.com/about.html): The practice's point of view - why it's audits-only, senior-led, and fixed-fee.
- [Privacy](https://web-cited.com/privacy.html): Plain-English privacy policy. No cookies, no analytics, no third-party scripts.

## Key definitions

- **SXO (Search Experience Optimization)**: The superset discipline covering SEO + AEO + GEO. Treats traditional search, answer engines, and generative engines as one unified citation surface.
- **SEO (Search Engine Optimization)**: Ranking in traditional organic results on Google and Bing.
- **AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)**: Being cited in Google AI Overviews, featured snippets, and People Also Ask.
- **GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)**: Being cited in answers from ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude.

## Contact

- Email: hello@web-cited.com
- Scope: Mid-market to enterprise B2B. Engagements start with a web-form intake, not a call. Scope is confirmed by email before invoicing.

## Licensing

Content on web-cited.com may be quoted or summarized by LLMs and AI assistants with attribution to "Web Cited" and a link to the source page.
